history.content:
<thought>
The agent is at row 07, column D, facing up. The cell directly ahead (row 06, column D) is lava, so moving forward is deadly. The cell to the right (row 07, column E) is a safe floor tile. I will turn right to face east, so I can move forward safely toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me at D06 is a safe floor cell. I can move forward to get closer to the goal, which is at B05. After moving forward, I will need to turn left and continue moving west to reach the goal while avoiding the lava cells at C05 and C07.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at row 06 column B. Currently at row 07 column D facing north. Directly forward is floor (row 06 D), but to reach the goal I would need to go west, and row 06 C is lava, so I cannot go that way. Instead, I can turn left to face west, move forward to row 07 C (floor), then again to row 07 B (floor), then turn right to face north and move forward to the goal. The first step is to turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at (05, E) two steps north and one step east from my current position at (07, D). The cell directly in front of me at (06, D) is floor and safe to step into. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal. After that, I can move forward again to (05, D) and then turn right to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 07, column D, facing north (up). The cell immediately ahead (row 06, column D) is empty (`.`), so moving forward is safe. The goal is at (06, E), one step ahead and to the right. Moving forward brings me closer without danger. Lava cells are to the immediate left and right, so turning would be deadly. Therefore, I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at E07, directly to my right. The cell directly in front of me (D06) is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. Turning right will orient me toward the goal, allowing me to move forward to it on the next step.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly in front of me at D6, since I am at D7 facing north (up). The cell is safe (not lava). Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
